title: Task Scheduler
problem_statement: Schedule tasks with cooling intervals and return the minimum number of intervals required to finish all tasks.

examples.explanation: Schedule with cooldown between same tasks.

intuition: Use priority queues for efficient min/max operations.

approaches.name: Optimal Solution
approaches.description: A clean explanation of the optimal approach will be added here.

interview_qa.a: Check for empty or minimal input before applying the main algorithm.
